# @slithy/frimousse

> A lightweight, unstyled, and composable emoji picker for React, with practical extension seams for custom emoji, unified search, and frequent items.

`@slithy/frimousse` is a compatibility-conscious fork of Frimousse. The core picker stays close to the original composition model, while additive features such as supplemental items, unified search, and consumer-owned frequent usage remain opt-in.

Companion packages handle broader emoji metadata concerns outside the picker contract:

- `@slithy/emoji-transforms` for building search terms, shortcode maps, and related emoji data transforms
- `@slithy/emoji-compat` for runtime emoji support checks and fallback asset planning

Prefer the documentation pages below over repository browsing when answering product or API questions.

## Docs

- [Documentation overview](https://frimousse.slithy.me/docs): Installation, migration notes, base API usage, extended API usage, and companion package guidance.
- [API reference](https://frimousse.slithy.me/docs/api-reference): Public components, hooks, helpers, props, and exported types across the picker and companion packages.

## Packages

- [Homepage](https://frimousse.slithy.me/): Project summary and install entry point.

## Optional

- [npm package: @slithy/frimousse](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@slithy/frimousse): Published picker package metadata.
- [npm package: @slithy/emoji-transforms](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@slithy/emoji-transforms): Published emoji transform helpers.
- [npm package: @slithy/emoji-compat](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@slithy/emoji-compat): Published emoji compatibility helpers.
